Company

About Rofo

Rofo was founded in 2007 with a simple goal: make it easier for businesses to find the right commercial space.

We started in San Francisco, working closely with small businesses navigating the complexities of office, retail, and industrial real estate. Over time, we expanded to markets across the United States, helping companies make more informed location decisions.

Along the way, Rofo has consistently explored new ways to improve the search experience:

  • Finalist for a Webby Award
  • Built one of the first commercial real estate apps using augmented reality
  • Selected as one of a small group of companies to build an app for LinkedIn

Most importantly, we’ve helped over 100,000 businesses connect with commercial real estate opportunities.

Today, we’re continuing that mission by leveraging modern data and AI to make market discovery faster, clearer, and more useful for business owners.

Have a question or looking for space? We’re here to help.

Helping businesses find commercial space since 2007.
